documentation:
# PyTech Tools

## Description
This project aims to provide basic tools that may be useful in general purpose projects.

## Roadmap
You may find some new features coming in the [Issue section](https://gitlab.com/pytech-srl/resources/pytech-tools/-/issues)

## Authors and acknowledgment
This package is provided thanks to:

- Alessandro Grandi (PyTech srl)

functions.name: pytech.datatypes.enums.enum_of_dataclass_factory
documentation:
Factory of Enums that only accept a specific Dataclass object as enum elements

```
param target_data_class

the dataclass that will be accepted as Enum value

return

the Enum object enforcing a check on enum values
```

functions.name: pytech.tools.logger.get_handler_logger_level_factory
documentation:
Factory to create utility functions to retrieve a handler logger level

```
param handler_env_var_name

the name of the env variable that stores the
```

handler logger level
\:return: the created function

methods.name: pytech.tools.logger.AbstractFormatter.set_formats
documentation:
Method that needs to be implemented in concrete child classes.

It needs to overwrite the self.level_formats_values with an interable
of log formatted strings.

methods.name: pytech.tools.logger.AbstractFormatter.get_formats
documentation:
Method that executes the self.set_formats if
self.leve_formats_values == None

```
return

the formats dict
```

k == log_level
v == log_level formatting

methods.name: pytech.tools.logger.AbstractFormatter.format
documentation: Function that sets format linked to the level of the record

classes.name: pytech.tools.logger.LoggerHandler

methods.name: pytech.tools.logger.LoggerHandler.__init__
documentation:
Class initialization

```
param filename

the log filename

param path

the log file's path
```

methods.name: pytech.tools.logger.LoggerHandler.get_logger
documentation:
Function that initializes the logger, set the log rotation,
configures the file_handler and stream_handler.

```
param logger_name

the logger name

param rotation_interval

the time rotating file handler's "when" param

param rotation_time

the time rotating file handler's "atTime" param

param rotation_backup

the time rotating file handler's "backupCount" param

return

a logging.Logger instance
```

Utility class that allows the user to customize the logger name with a
single <path/filename> log file.

Basic usage:
- Create a logger.py file and initialize the LoggerHandler class:

  logger_handler = LoggerHandler()

- Import the logger_handler in each file that will log messages and assign
  the result of logger_handler.get_logger(__name__) to the logger variable:

  from logger import logger_handler
  
  logger = logger_handler.get_logger(__name__)

- Log messages with the logging.Logger methods:
  - logger.debug(<msg>)
  - logger.info(<msg>)
  - logger.warning(<msg>)
  - logger.error(<msg>)
  - logger.critical(<msg>)
